description: Text card on a solid DHS-blue background with red horizontal rules and a blue and white circular quotation-mark icon in the upper-left corner. White body text states that the Department acknowledges concern among many communities and continues to support state and local authorities with detection technology and law enforcement; urges Congress to enact counter-UAS legislation when it reconvenes to extend and expand existing counter-drone authorities to identify and mitigate any threat that may emerge; and notes a limited number of visual sightings of drones over military facilities in New Jersey and elsewhere, including within restricted airspace, states that such sightings near or over DoD installations are not new, that DoD takes unauthorized access seriously and coordinates with federal, state, and local law enforcement, and that local commanders are engaged to ensure detection and mitigation. The text closes with '###'. The circular DHS seal is at the bottom right.
notable_text: We urge Congress to enact counter-UAS legislation; 'Such sightings near or over DoD installations are not new'; ###
